projectDescription: A dark-themed ransomware UI demonstration built with CustomTkinter, featuring animated countdown timers, threatening message displays, and simulated encryption status indicators — for educational and demonstration purposes only.
keyFeatures: Dark-themed CustomTkinter UI built on top of standard Tkinter
Animated countdown timer with real-time progress bar
Threatening message display panel with warning box
Simulated file encryption status panel with animated progress
Thread-safe timer updates using Python threading
publicApiSurface: CountdownTimer.stop() — stops the countdown timer thread
StatusPanel.update_status() — advances the simulated encryption progress
